components.text: Balancing strength, mobility, and recovery across five sessions. Starting with an easy ramp-up.

value.title: Monday · Ramp-Up
value.moves: Drafting moves...

value.title: Monday · Ramp-Up
value.moves: Goblet squat · Push-up · Glute bridge · Dead bug · Farmer carry
value.note: Keep effort easy. The goal is to wake up patterns, not peak intensity.

value.title: Monday · Ramp-Up
value.moves: Goblet squat · Push-up · Glute bridge · Dead bug · Farmer carry
value.note: Keep effort easy. The goal is to wake up patterns, not peak intensity.

value.moves: Goblet squat · Push-up · Glute bridge · Dead bug · Farmer carry
value.note: Keep effort easy. The goal is to wake up patterns, not peak intensity.

value.title: Tuesday · Lower Strength
value.moves: Back squat 4×5 · Romanian deadlift 3×8 · Walking lunge 3×12 · Hanging knee raise 3×10
value.note: Rest 2 min between heavy sets. Stop 1 rep shy of failure.

value.title: Wednesday · Mobility & Zone 2
value.focus: Easy aerobic and range of motion
value.moves: Brisk walk or bike · Hip 90/90 · Thoracic opener · Ankle rocks
value.note: Keep heart rate conversational. Recovery is the training today.

value.note: Keep effort easy. The goal is to wake up patterns, not peak intensity.

value.focus: Easy aerobic and range of motion

value.title: Thursday · Upper Push & Pull
value.moves: Bench press 4×6 · Pull-up 4×AMRAP · DB shoulder press 3×8 · Seated row 3×10 · Face pull 3×15
value.note: Alternate push and pull. Pause at the chest on bench for control.

value.title: Thursday · Upper Push & Pull
value.moves: Bench press 4×6 · Pull-up 4×AMRAP · DB shoulder press 3×8 · Seated row 3×10 · Face pull 3×15
value.note: Alternate push and pull. Pause at the chest on bench for control.

value.title: Friday · Conditioning
value.moves: 5 rounds: 200 m row · 10 KB swings · 10 push-ups · 60 s rest
value.note: Leave the last round feeling strong. Stop if form breaks down.

components.text: Plan ready. Weekend stays open for walks, stretching, or a hike.
Tip: log sets and add 2.5 kg next week when all reps feel clean.
